notes: Classic symptom - osmotic diuresis from hyperglycemia
Differential - need to distinguish from diabetes
Common in pregnancy - needs glucose testing
Cells not getting glucose despite high blood sugar
Body burning fat/muscle for energy - urgent sign

Nerve damage from chronic high glucose

Affects up to 75% of diabetic men
New onset in previously dry child
